content:
# Non Productive Time

**Summary**: Time during drilling operations where no progress is made toward the well objective.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-saadeldin|SAADELDIN, 2023]] aimed to reduce non-productive time (NPT) by providing early warnings for vibration issues.

## Scientific Context

- [[2023-saadeldin|SAADELDIN, 2023]] NPT is a major cost driver in horizontal and curve sections.
